p2|SAL.summary: Health limitation in performing moderate physical efforts like 30-minute walks or household cleaning (yes/no).

p7|SAL.summary: Pain-related difficulty with usual work and household tasks in the past 4 weeks (0-10 scale).

p25_1|SAL.summary: Satisfaction with medical attention received from doctors (ordinal scale).

p26_1|SAL.summary: Ranking of eating vegetables as health benefit relative to 10 other activities (1-11 ranking).

p41|SAL.summary: Self-perception of current life situation using visual figure scale (categorical).

p44|SAL.summary: Availability of free time during the week (yes/no).

p46|SAL.summary: Physical activity of 30 minutes or more in the past week (yes/no).
